repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: parent single-margin LP/sign versus non-Gaussian SVAR gap

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021: LP/VAR same-IRF equivalence under common identifying restrictions
GourierouxMonfortRenne2017 and LanneMeitzSaikkonen2017 identify non-Gaussian SVAR shocks, but not a row-pasting versus cumulant-label iff frontier
Guay2021 and Read2022 cover higher-moment rank and sign/zero algorithms, not a row-pasting plus cumulant-residual support threshold

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: Mechanism upgrade is only partial: PN4 parent-corner reduction fails because tau_w^*(P)=lambda_w(P)L_delta4^max(P) is not algebraically chi_w(P) as claimed in delta_summary.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: Misses MontielOleaPlagborgMollerQian2022, a close published critique of higher-moment SVAR identification and weak-identification demands.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship until the threshold is repaired into a sharp iff frontier that actually reduces to the parent margin.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2 | Corollary parent
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed parent reduction is false as written: under q_h=Qe_j, tau_w^*(P)=lambda_w(P)L_delta4^max(P), not the envelope support loss chi_w(P), absent an additional defining equality.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: lambda_w(P) is only described as a modulus from distance to support loss, but the conjecture multiplies it by a fourth-cumulant residual; the required residual-to-support inequality is not defined.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine tau_w^*(P) as E_w^row(P) plus an envelope-filter support loss, or add an explicit calibrated definition of lambda_w(P) that makes the parent corner identity true.
Add MontielOleaPlagborgMollerQian2022 to Related work and explain why the proposed mechanism threshold addresses their weak-higher-moment warning rather than assuming it away.

State the flagship result as a single iff theorem/conjecture with the repaired threshold as the separating operational quantity, rather than leaving the threshold as a separate lower-bound conjecture.

recommended_next_step: Redraft Conjecture 2 and the parent-reduction corollary so the threshold is an envelope support-loss object, then rerun novelty review.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The row/cumulant/pasting channels are named, but the mandatory parent-corner algebra does not deliver the claimed collapse to chi_w(P).
